open_questions: Card sets single_symbol_only=true; single symbol XAUUSD.DWX registered (P2 saturation exception documented in SPEC.md).
OnTick news ordering: ExitSignal loop runs before news_allows check (per 2026-07-02 audit binding); NewsFilterHook is a no-op (returns false). This EA correctly applied the audit fix.
ATR stop is a sizing backstop only (wide 4x ATR); no fixed price stop in the card. Strategy relies on 07:00 GMT session exit as the primary exit.
